package.name: gz_lidar_timestamp
package.description: Append per-point relative timestamps to a Gazebo gpu_lidar PointCloud2 so lidar odometry (KISS-ICP / LIO-SAM / rko_lio) can deskew. Gazebo omits the per-point time field; this node computes it from azimuth / column index and the scan rate, then republishes. See PLAN §17.2.
